title: JmapRequestBuilder::build allows empty method_calls (RFC 8620 §3.3 violation)
description: jmap.rs: build() on a fresh JmapRequestBuilder (no add_call) produces a JmapRequest with empty method_calls array. RFC 8620 §3.3 requires at least one method call. Like the duplicate call_id assert, this is a programming error that should panic early.
